# KuroBox — Design System MASTER
# Generated by UI UX Pro Max | Cyber-Industrial Theme

## Identity
- **Product**: KuroBox — Dynamic Kanban & Table Engine
- **Style**: Cyber-Industrial (overrides default recommendation)
- **Pattern**: App Dashboard + Interactive Board View

---

## Color Palette

| Role        | Value     | Tailwind             |
|-------------|-----------|----------------------|
| Background  | `#000000` | `bg-black`           |
| Card        | `#18181b` | `bg-zinc-900`        |
| Card Hover  | `#27272a` | `bg-zinc-800`        |
| Border      | `#27272a` | `border-zinc-800`    |
| Text Primary| `#ffffff` | `text-white`         |
| Text Muted  | `#a1a1aa` | `text-zinc-400`      |
| Accent 1    | `#FFDE4D` | `text-[#FFDE4D]` / `bg-[#FFDE4D]` (Cyber Yellow) |
| Accent 2    | `#FF5F00` | `text-[#FF5F00]`     (Hot Orange, sparingly)       |

## Typography

- **Font**: Plus Jakarta Sans
- **Import**: `@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700&display=swap')`
- **Scale**: xs=10px, sm=12px, base=14px, lg=16px, xl=20px

## Micro-Interactions

### Drag & Drop (Kanban Cards)
- Grab: `scale-[1.01] rotate-1 shadow-[3px_3px_0px_#FFDE4D]`
- Drop zone (active): `border-2 border-dashed border-[#FFDE4D] bg-[#FFDE4D]/5`
- Drop zone (idle): `border border-zinc-800 bg-zinc-900/30`

### Modals (Glassmorphism)
- Overlay: `fixed inset-0 backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60`
- Panel: `bg-zinc-950 border border-zinc-800`

### Table Rows
- Hover: `hover:bg-zinc-800/50`
- Transition: `transition-colors` (150ms)

### Buttons
- Primary: `bg-[#FFDE4D] text-black hover:bg-[#FFE87A] active:scale-[0.98]`
- Ghost: `border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-300 hover:border-zinc-500 hover:text-white`
- Danger: `border border-red-800 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-900/20`

## Anti-Patterns (AVOID)
- Rounded-full pill buttons (use `rounded-sm` instead — sharp, geometric)
- Soft box-shadows (use crisp `shadow-[3px_3px_0px_#FFDE4D]`)
- Gradient backgrounds
- Light mode (dark-only interface)
- Emojis as icons (use Lucide React SVGs)

## Pre-Delivery Checklist
- [ ] `cursor-pointer` on all clickable elements
- [ ] Hover states with smooth transitions (150–200ms ease)
- [ ] Text contrast ≥ 4.5:1 (white on zinc-900 passes)
- [ ] Focus states visible for keyboard nav (`focus:border-[#FFDE4D]`)
- [ ] `prefers-reduced-motion` respected (global CSS rule)
- [ ] Responsive: 375px, 768px, 1024px, 1440px
- [ ] No emojis as icons
